mapper.sql: USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_PASS, ROLE_ID, ORG, IS_AVAILABLE, INIT_PASS, ERROR_NUM, PASS_STATUS, LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, RESERVED_FIELD4, RESERVED_FIELD5, RESERVED_FIELD6, RESERVED_FIELD7, LAST_LOGIN_TIME, NOT_EXPIRED, ACCOUNT_NOT_LOCKED, CREDENTIALS_NOT_EXPIRED, MOBILE_NO
mapper.select:
select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
from tbl_user
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_user (USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_PASS, ROLE_ID, ORG, IS_AVAILABLE, INIT_PASS, ERROR_NUM, PASS_STATUS, LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, RESERVED_FIELD4, RESERVED_FIELD5, RESERVED_FIELD6, RESERVED_FIELD7, LAST_LOGIN_TIME, NOT_EXPIRED, ACCOUNT_NOT_LOCKED, CREDENTIALS_NOT_EXPIRED, MOBILE_NO) values (#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{initPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastPassUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField6,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField7,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{notExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountNotLocked,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{credentialsNotExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobileNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into tbl_user
USER_ID,
USER_NAME,
USER_PASS,
ROLE_ID,
ORG,
IS_AVAILABLE,
INIT_PASS,
ERROR_NUM,
PASS_STATUS,
LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME,
CREATE_BY,
CREATE_TIME,
UPDATE_TIME,
UPDATE_BY,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,
RESERVED_FIELD4,
RESERVED_FIELD5,
RESERVED_FIELD6,
RESERVED_FIELD7,
LAST_LOGIN_TIME,
NOT_EXPIRED,
ACCOUNT_NOT_LOCKED,
CREDENTIALS_NOT_EXPIRED,
MOBILE_NO,
#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{initPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{errorNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{passStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastPassUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField7,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{notExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{accountNotLocked,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{credentialsNotExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mobileNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update tbl_user
USER_ID = #{record.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USER_NAME = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USER_PASS = #{record.userPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROLE_ID = #{record.roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{record.org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_AVAILABLE = #{record.isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
INIT_PASS = #{record.initPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ERROR_NUM = #{record.errorNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PASS_STATUS = #{record.passStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME = #{record.lastPassUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CREATE_BY = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_TIME = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD4 = #{record.reservedField4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD5 = #{record.reservedField5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD6 = #{record.reservedField6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD7 = #{record.reservedField7,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_LOGIN_TIME = #{record.lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
NOT_EXPIRED = #{record.notExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ACCOUNT_NOT_LOCKED = #{record.accountNotLocked,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREDENTIALS_NOT_EXPIRED = #{record.credentialsNotExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MOBILE_NO = #{record.mobileNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update tbl_user set USER_ID = #{record.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_NAME = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_PASS = #{record.userPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROLE_ID = #{record.roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{record.org,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_AVAILABLE = #{record.isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INIT_PASS = #{record.initPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ERROR_NUM = #{record.errorNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PASS_STATUS = #{record.passStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME = #{record.lastPassUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CREATE_BY = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_TIME = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD4 = #{record.reservedField4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD5 = #{record.reservedField5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD6 = #{record.reservedField6,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD7 = #{record.reservedField7,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_LOGIN_TIME = #{record.lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, NOT_EXPIRED = #{record.notExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACCOUNT_NOT_LOCKED = #{record.accountNotLocked,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREDENTIALS_NOT_EXPIRED = #{record.credentialsNotExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MOBILE_NO = #{record.mobileNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update tbl_user
USER_NAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USER_PASS = #{userPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
INIT_PASS = #{initPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ERROR_NUM = #{errorNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PASS_STATUS = #{passStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME = #{lastPassUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD4 = #{reservedField4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD5 = #{reservedField5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD6 = #{reservedField6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD7 = #{reservedField7,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_LOGIN_TIME = #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
NOT_EXPIRED = #{notExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ACCOUNT_NOT_LOCKED = #{accountNotLocked,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREDENTIALS_NOT_EXPIRED = #{credentialsNotExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MOBILE_NO = #{mobileNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update tbl_user set USER_NAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_PASS = #{userPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INIT_PASS = #{initPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ERROR_NUM = #{errorNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PASS_STATUS = #{passStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME = #{lastPassUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD4 = #{reservedField4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD5 = #{reservedField5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD6 = #{reservedField6,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD7 = #{reservedField7,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_LOGIN_TIME = #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, NOT_EXPIRED = #{notExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACCOUNT_NOT_LOCKED = #{accountNotLocked,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREDENTIALS_NOT_EXPIRED = #{credentialsNotExpired,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MOBILE_NO = #{mobileNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
